title: Toolchain Selection, Compatibility, and Reproducible Setup · Policy Clinic: Runtime Version
summary: Select a minimal compatible toolchain and prove clean-machine setup. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates runtime version increment in a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.
Document bounded suppressions, owners, expiry, and review evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
